installConfigs.instructions: Add the @storybook/addon-mcp addon to your project's Storybook configuration (see https://storybook.js.org/docs/ai/mcp/overview) and run Storybook (default port 6006). The addon exposes an MCP endpoint at /mcp on the Storybook dev server. If your Storybook runs on a different port, update serverUrl accordingly.

Add the @storybook/addon-mcp addon to your project's Storybook configuration (see https://storybook.js.org/docs/ai/mcp/overview) and run Storybook (default port 6006). The addon exposes an MCP endpoint at /mcp on the Storybook dev server. If your Storybook runs on a different port, update serverUrl accordingly.
